jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Platform
jobs.content: <p><strong>Senior Software Engineer, Platform</strong></p><p>Branch is the mobile deep-linking + cross-platform attribution platform pioneered around universal-deferred-deep-link-as-a-service & Mobile Linking Platform.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Application Security Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead Branch's Application Security function across the Universal Links / Attribution / Journeys stack.</p>
